title: Applicability: IPO, FPO, rights, QIP, preferential, etc.
text: Regulations apply to IPOs by unlisted issuers, rights issues, FPOs, preferential issues, QIPs, IDRs, SME IPOs, IGP listing, and bonus issues (subject to noted carve-outs).
notes: Used as a gating flag to ensure we’re in-scope for main-board IPO checks.

title: Reference date for meeting eligibility
text: Issuer must satisfy Chapter II conditions as on filing the draft offer document and again on filing the offer document with RoC.
notes: Model as timestamp checks on data sources (draft filing date vs RHP filing date).

title: Disqualification: issuer/promoters/directors/sellers debarred
text: Not eligible if issuer, any promoter/promoter group/director/selling shareholder is debarred from accessing capital markets by SEBI (unless past debarment has expired).
notes: Maps to is_debarred + has_debarred_directors + selling_shareholders_debarred.

title: Disqualification: promoter/director of another debarred company
text: Not eligible if any promoter/director is promoter/director of another company debarred by SEBI.
notes: Add a relational check (director cross-links).

title: Disqualification: wilful defaulter or fraudulent borrower
text: Not eligible if issuer/promoters/directors is/are wilful defaulters or fraudulent borrowers.
notes: You already modelled this as is_fraudulent.

title: Disqualification: fugitive economic offender
text: Not eligible if any promoter/director is a fugitive economic offender.
notes: Map to is_fugitive.

title: No outstanding convertibles/rights (pre-IPO)
text: Not eligible if there are outstanding convertibles or rights to receive equity before filing, except carve-outs for ESOP, SAR (exercised pre-RHP/prospectus with disclosures) and fully paid mandatorily convertible securities converted by filing.
notes: Your ESOP/SAR/mandatory conversion carve-outs match this.

title: NTA ≥ ₹3 cr for each of the last 3 full years
text: Net tangible assets of at least ₹3 crore in each of the preceding three full years.
notes: List length==3 and each ≥ 3cr (in paise).

title: Monetary assets ≤ 50% of NTA unless committed/used; OSF-only carve-out
text: Monetary assets not more than 50% of NTA unless utilized/firmly committed; 50% limit not applicable if IPO is entirely offer-for-sale.
notes: Your monetary_asset_ratio/used_monetary_assets/is_offer_for_sale_only.

title: Operating profit ≥ ₹15 cr in each of last 3 years
text: Average ≥ ₹15 cr with profit in each of the preceding three years (restated, consolidated).
notes: You already enforce per-year ≥ ₹15 cr.

title: Net worth ≥ ₹1 cr in each of last 3 years
text: Net worth of at least ₹1 cr in each of the preceding three full years (restated, consolidated).
notes: Your `net_worths` all ≥ 1 cr.

title: Name change → ≥50% revenue from new activity
text: If name changed within last 1 year, then ≥50% of revenue in the preceding full year from the activity indicated by new name.
notes: Maps to changed_name_recently and percent_revenue_from_new_name ≥ 50.

title: QIB fallback when 6(1) not met
text: If 6(1) not satisfied, eligible only via book-building with ≥75% of net offer to QIBs (refund if not allotted).
notes: Model as conditional alternative path when 6(1) failed and uses_book_building + qib_allocation_done == true.

title: SR equity shares: tech intensive, promoter-exec, 2:1–10:1, same face value, one class, 3-months pre-DRHP
text: If SR equity shares exist, conditions on issuer type, SR-holder net worth cap, exec role, shareholder approval, pre-DRHP holding ≥3 months, voting ratio 2:1–10:1, one SR class, same face value, parity otherwise.
notes: You modelled these as sr_* fields; use only if SR is present.

title: Apply to stock exchange (in-principle)
text: Issuer must apply to one or more stock exchanges and choose a designated stock exchange (Schedule XIX).
notes: applied_to_stock_exchange == true.

title: Depository agreement executed
text: Issuer must enter into a depository agreement for dematerialisation of issued and proposed securities.
notes: has_demat_agreement == true.

title: Promoters’ holdings fully in demat
text: All promoter-held specified securities must be dematerialised prior to filing the offer document.
notes: promoter_securities_demat == true.

title: No partly-paid equity outstanding
text: All existing partly-paid equity must be fully paid up or forfeited.
notes: no_partly_paid_shares == true.

title: 75% means of finance tied up (verifiable)
text: Firm finance arrangements through verifiable means towards ≥75% of stated means of finance for a specific project (excluding IPO proceeds/internal accruals).
notes: finance_75_percent_done == true.

title: General corporate purposes cap ≤ 25%
text: GCP in objects of the issue shall not exceed 25% of the amount being raised (with later blended cap provisions).
notes: general_corp_purpose_ratio ≤ 25.

title: OFS shares must be held ≥ 1 year pre-DRHP (with carve-outs)
text: Only fully paid equity held ≥1 year before draft offer filing may be offered for sale, with carve-outs for Govt/infra, court/tribunal schemes, and bonus from free reserves (no revaluation).
notes: Model as `shares_held_duration_months ≥ 12` or applicable carve-outs (govt, scheme, bonus-from-free-reserves w/ conditions).

title: Additional OFS caps when using 6(2) route
text: If filing under 6(2): large holders (>20% fully diluted) can OFS ≤ 50% of their pre-issue holding; small holders (<20%) can OFS ≤ 10%; lock-in clauses apply.
notes: Applicable only under 6(2) (QIB route).

title: Minimum promoters’ contribution ≥ 20% of post-issue capital
text: Promoters shall hold at least 20% of post-issue capital. If promoters hold <20%, specified institutions/non-individual public shareholders/promoter-group entities may meet the shortfall up to 10% without being identified as promoters. Not applicable when issuer has no identifiable promoter.
notes: Add issuer fields: promoter_post_issue_pct, shortfall_filled_by_eligible_entities, has_identifiable_promoter.

title: Form of promoters’ contribution and pricing constraints
text: Promoter 20% contribution may be in equity shares (including SR shares) or by subscribing to convertibles; if conversion price is not pre-determined/disclosed, promoters contribute only via convertibles and undertake to convert.
notes: Maps to booleans about instrument type and conversion price disclosure; see also weighted-average price constraint for staggered convertibles.

title: Weighted-average price floor for staggered convertibles
text: If convertibles convert on different dates and promoter contribution is via equity at a pre-determined conversion price, such contribution shall not be at a price lower than the weighted average price of equity arising from conversion.
notes: Requires computing weighted average; add helper in Python pre-check or Lean arithmetic.

title: If IPO is only convertible debt (no prior equity): promoter brings ≥20% of project cost and ≥20% of issue size (own funds) in equity
text: For an IPO of convertible debt without a prior equity IPO, promoters bring ≥20% of project cost in equity, and at least 20% of the issue size from own funds in equity; staged implementation allowed pro-rata by stage.
notes: Add fields: project_cost, promoter_equity_brought, issue_size_own_funds_equity, staged_project boolean.

title: Promoters’ contribution timing
text: Promoters must satisfy the minimum contribution requirements at least one day prior to opening of the issue; if subscribing, funds to be escrowed and released with issue proceeds; extra rules for partly-paid shares and large contributions.
notes: Add fields: promoter_contribution_escrowed, timing_ok.

title: Securities ineligible for minimum promoters’ contribution
text: Certain specified securities are ineligible when acquired in last 3 years for non-cash with revaluation/capitalisation of intangibles, bonus from revaluation/unrealised profits, acquired in last 1 year < issue price (with stated cures), pledged securities, etc.; schemes under Companies Act 2013 may qualify.
notes: Model as filters on promoter_contribution_components; allow cures: top-up price difference; scheme approvals; bonus from free reserves only.

title: Lock-in of minimum promoters’ contribution
text: Minimum promoters’ contribution (including permitted substitutes such as AIFs/FVCIs/SCBs/PFIs/Insurers/non-individual public ≥5% / promoter-group entities other than promoter) shall be locked-in for 18 months from allotment (3 years when majority of non-OFS proceeds are for capital expenditure).
notes: Add fields: majority_proceeds_for_capex, lockin_start_allotment_date; treat ‘SR’ references as per SR framework.

title: Lock-in of promoters’ holding in excess of MPC
text: Promoters’ holding in excess of minimum promoters’ contribution shall be locked-in for 6 months (1 year when majority proceeds are for capex).
notes: Same capex branch as 16(1)(a).

title: Computation explanations (post-issue base, ESOP/SAR, weighted average)
text: Promoters’ contribution computed on post-issue expanded capital assuming full conversion and exercise of vested ESOP/SAR; defines weighted-average price terms.
notes: Reference math notes for audit—no pass/fail by itself.

title: Lock-in for pre-issue capital held by non-promoters
text: Entire pre-issue capital held by persons other than promoters locked-in for 6 months from allotment, with exceptions for ESOP/ESPS/SAR, ESOP trusts, and VC/AIF/FCVI holdings (with their own 6-month clock from purchase).
notes: Add lists by holder category with acquisition dates to compute 6-month minima.

title: Green shoe lending: lock-in not applicable during lending period
text: Lock-in does not apply to specified securities lent to stabilising agent under the green shoe option during lending; on return, lock-in continues for the remaining period.
notes: Add fields: lent_for_green_shoe, lending_start/end; compute remaining lock-in post-return.

title: Lock-in of partly-paid specified securities
text: If locked-in specified securities are partly paid and called-up amount is less than that called-up for public, lock-in ends only on expiry of 3 years after they become pari passu with public shares.
notes: Track date they become pari passu; lock-in = +3 years.

title: Inscription/recording of non-transferability
text: Certificates of locked-in specified securities must bear ‘non-transferable’ with lock-in period; for demat, issuer ensures lock-in is recorded by depository.
notes: Compliance/documentation check: require demat lock-in flag and/or certificate marking proof.

title: Pledge of locked-in specified securities by promoters
text: Promoters’ locked-in specified securities (except SR) may be pledged as collateral for loans from specified institutions if the pledge is a term of sanction and (a) for 16(a) lock-ins, loan is for objects of issue; (b) for 16(b) lock-ins, pledge is a sanction term. Lock-in continues on invocation for transferee.
notes: Add fields: pledge_exists, lender_type_ok, sanction_clause_present, object_of_issue_loan (for 16(a)).

title: Transfer of locked-in specified securities
text: Locked-in promoter securities (Reg 16) may be transferred to another/new promoter/promoter-group; locked-in non-promoter securities (Reg 17) may be transferred to persons holding locked-in securities along with the transferred lot; lock-in continues for balance period with transferee.
notes: Enforce ‘lock-in carries’ and allowed transferee categories.
